title: dalbergia hortensis
intro: Dalbergia hortensis, also known as the Hong Kong ebony or Hong Kong rosewood, is a species of flowering tree in the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dalbergia hortensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Dalbergia hortensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
